title: Developing a System for Classifying Text Data into Hierarchical Categories with Complex Relationships
scenario: Develop a system to classify text data into hierarchical categories with complex relationships between categories and subcategories. The system should be able to handle large datasets and enable efficient querying and filtering of text data.
constraints: Must use a deep learning framework such as TensorFlow or PyTorch

evaluationCriteria.description: The system should accurately classify text data into their corresponding categories.
The hierarchical relationships between categories and subcategories should be correctly implemented.
The system should handle edge cases such as missing or invalid data correctly.
The system should be computationally efficient and able to handle large datasets.
